title: Elrood-Derilyn Trade Route

The '''Elrood-Derilyn Trade Route''' also known as the '''Elrood-Derilyn Run''' or simply the '''E-D Run''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace trade route]] that was located in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]<ref name="PotG3" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==Description==
The route was first blazed as a connection between [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]] and the [[Derilyn system/Legends|Derilyn system]] through a small area of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] between [[The Drift/Legends|The Drift]] and the [[Degan Gas Clouds]]. Smaller branches of the main route connected the few [[Star system/Legends|systems]] off the route with the main [[Planet/Legends|worlds]], although these branches were less traveled. These extensions connected [[Halbara/Legends|Halbara]] with Elrood, [[Berea]] with [[Derilyn]] and [[Almar]]an with the [[Torina system/Legends|Torina system]]. Several routes went to the [[Lanthrym system/Legends|Lanthrym system]], while the worlds inside the Degan Gas Clouds were connected with the [[Kidron system/Legends|Kidron system]].<ref name="PotG3" /> The E-D Run was connected with the larger [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]] via the [[Coyn Route]] which intersected the Elrood-Derilyn Run at [[Coyn]],<ref name="LotE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref> the "Gateway to Elrood Sector."<ref name="PotG3" />

==History==
The route was first established during the heyday of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] and connected the important worlds of the Elrood sector. Although the sector was isolated, the colonies survived, but never achieved any wealth.<ref name="PotG3" />

When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] came to power, the Elrood sector was received little attention. This change with the [[Sixty Hour War|occupation]] of Derilyn, the closest planet to Imperial space, and the creation of an interdicted space zone around Derilyn and Berea. This made Torina effectively the new last stop on the route and brought an economic boost to the system. The part of the route between Torina and Derilyn became known as "[[The Extreme]]". The Extreme was heavily patrolled by the few Imperial ships in the sector. Sometimes, asteroids were [[The Barricade|placed]] in the route to force ships back into realspace. As an act of defiance, the people pioneered the [[Coyn Route]] to the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]], thus isolating Derilyn even more.<ref name="PotG3" />

==Travel times==
{|border="1" cellpadding="2"
!width="200"|Planetary route
!width="200"|Travel time (using Class One hyperdrive)
|-
| '''Elrood—Kidron''' || 3 hours<ref name="PotG3" />
|-
| '''Kidron—Bodrin''' || 4 hours<ref name="PotG3" />
|-
| '''Bodrin—Coyn''' || 2 hours<ref name="PotG3" />
|-
| '''Coyn—Korad''' || 1 hours<ref name="PotG3" />
|-
| '''Korad—Merisee''' || 1 hours<ref name="PotG3" />
|-
| '''Merisee—Torina''' || 3 hours<ref name="PotG3" />
|-
| '''Torina—Derilyn''' || 4 hours<ref name="PotG3" />
|-
| '''Total travel time''' || 18 hours<ref name="PotG3" />
|}
